DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sink.description: Delete the specified sinkhole. The sinkhole must not have any active ingress rules defined. A 409 response code indicates that this condition is not met.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare account.
parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

409.description: Conflict -- the sinkhole has active ingress rules that must be deleted first.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

DELETE /zones/{zone_id}/intel/sinkholes/.description: Delete the specified ingress rule. The sinkhole must belong to the same account as the zone.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare zone.
parameters.name: zone_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the ingress rule.
parameters.name: ingress_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkhol.description: Lists sinkholes owned by the account for redirecting malicious traffic.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare account.
parameters.name: account_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

account_tag.description: The account tag that owns this sinkhole.

created_on.description: The date and time when the sinkhole was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the sinkhole was last modified.

r2_bucket.description: The name of the R2 bucket to store results.

r2_id.description: The id of the R2 instance.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkhol.summary: List sinkholes owned by this account

GET /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkhol.description: Get the specified sinkhole by its unique identifier.

parameters.name: account_id

parameters.name: sinkhole_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the sinkhole was last modified.

r2_bucket.description: The name of the R2 bucket to store results.

r2_id.description: The id of the R2 instance.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkhol.description: List all ingress rules associated with the specified sinkhole.

parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

cidr.description: The CIDR block for the ingress rule.

created_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the ingress rule.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was last modified.

sinkhole_id.description: The sinkhole this ingress rule belongs to.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

GET /zones/{zone_id}/intel/sinkholes/{si.description: Get the specified ingress rule associated with a sinkhole. The sinkhole must belong to the same account as the zone.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

cidr.description: The CIDR block for the ingress rule.

created_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the ingress rule.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was last modified.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkho.description: Create a new sinkhole. Logs of large request bodies will be truncated, but the full request body can be recorded in R2. If you wish to record large request bodies in R2, include the R2 key ID, key secret, and bucket name in the request body.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare account.
parameters.name: account_id

r2_bucket.description: The name of the R2 bucket to store results. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

r2_id.description: The id of the R2 instance. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

r2_secret.description: The secret key for the R2 API token. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

account_tag.description: The account tag that owns this sinkhole.

created_on.description: The date and time when the sinkhole was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the sinkhole was last modified.

r2_bucket.description: The name of the R2 bucket to store results.

r2_id.description: The id of the R2 instance.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkho.summary: Create a new sinkhole for your account

POST /zones/{zone_id}/intel/sinkholes/{s.description: Create a new ingress rule for the specified sinkhole. The CIDR block must be a Cloudflare BYOIP associated with your account. The zone_id must be a zone with the ability to create Spectrum Apps. The sinkhole must belong to the same account as the zone.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare zone.
parameters.name: zone_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

cidr.description: The CIDR block for the ingress rule in IPv4 or IPv6 notation (e.g., 192.0.2.0/24). Must be a Cloudflare BYOIP associated with your account.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

cidr.description: The CIDR block for the ingress rule.

created_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was created.

id.description: The unique identifier for the ingress rule.

modified_on.description: The date and time when the ingress rule was last modified.

sinkhole_id.description: The sinkhole this ingress rule belongs to.

zone_tag.description: The zone tag associated with this ingress rule.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

PUT /accounts/{account_id}/intel/sinkhol.description: Update the name or R2 configuration of the specified sinkhole.

parameters.name: account_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.

r2_bucket.description: The name of the R2 bucket to store results. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

r2_id.description: The id of the R2 instance. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

r2_secret.description: The secret key for the R2 API token. Required if you want to store large request bodies in R2.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

PUT /zones/{zone_id}/intel/sinkholes/{si.description: Update the specified ingress rule. The sinkhole must belong to the same account as the zone.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Cloudflare zone.
parameters.name: zone_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the sinkhole.
parameters.name: sinkhole_id

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the ingress rule.
parameters.name: ingress_id

cidr.description: The CIDR block for the ingress rule in IPv4 or IPv6 notation (e.g., 192.0.2.0/24). Must be a Cloudflare BYOIP associated with your account.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.
